## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have not committed any `.env` files, secrets, or personal credentials
- [ ] I have not hardcoded any IPs, paths, or usernames
- [ ] New or changed backend functions have docstrings and type hints
- [ ] The frontend builds without errors (`cd frontend && npm run build`)
- [ ] I have updated the README or docs if my change affects usage
- [ ] I have added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
